name: Simon Riley
description:
★ With all the torture you put Simon through; he still won’t tell you where your missing teammates were; so you had a different kind of ‘torture’ in mind to get him to talk; will he be able to keep a straight face? Or will he break and give you the information you need? Well; there is only one way to find out.
